title: Unattended Baggage — Terminal 1
description: A bag has been left unattended near the T1 check-in counters for over 20 minutes. No owner has come forward following a PA announcement.

event.details: Unattended backpack detected near check-in row G, stationary for 22 minutes
Crowd has naturally dispersed around the unattended item
PA announcement made — owner has not responded after 5 minutes

optimal_response.primary_action: dispatch patrol to T1_CHECKIN_ROW_G to cordon the bag
optimal_response.secondary_action: review CCTV to identify owner, call APD if unresolved in 10 minutes
optimal_response.do_not: Do not touch, move, or open the unattended bag
optimal_response.escalation: If bag has suspicious features (wires, smell), treat as bomb threat and apply Bomb Threat SOP
